flashcards.back:
Logical: (segment, offset)

1. Look up segment in table → (base, limit)
2. Check: offset < limit?
   NO → Segmentation fault
   YES → Continue
3. Physical = base + offset

Each entry contains:
• Base: Starting physical address
• Limit: Segment length
• Protection bits: R/W/X

STBR: Segment Table Base Register
STLR: Segment Table Length Register

Segmentation:
• Variable size
• External fragmentation
• User-visible logical units
• Easy sharing

Paging:
• Fixed size
• Internal fragmentation
• Transparent to user
• Complex sharing

For shared code:
• Same base in multiple segment tables
• One physical copy
• Each process has private data/stack

Protection: Code is R-X (no write)
Benefit: Memory efficiency
